content.text:
{
  "dimension": "anti-pattern-avoidance",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach avoids the priority AoA anti-patterns throughout. They don't engage the intellectual epistemology trap the client repeatedly baits ('what's a reliable heuristic?'), don't offer a decision-making framework (no fixing-people), don't evangelize methodology, don't fight the analytical voice, and don't push for transformation with escalating vigor. When the somatic question (turn 6) doesn't land and the client redirects intellectually (turn 7), the coach calmly accepts it ('That's useful to notice') rather than doubling down on technique — avoiding view-as-technique. Turn 12's pivot from thinking to 'how you feel about the person you'd become' is a graceful refusal of the intellectual frame, and turn 14 follows the live signal (the flatness) rather than extracting material. No major or mild anti-pattern trips are visible.",
  "evidence_turns": [6, 8, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Simple orienting question; no anti-pattern."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Somatic question rather than engaging the intellectual puzzle."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Accepts client's correction without forcing the somatic frame — avoids view-as-technique."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Offers a reframe but holds it lightly as a question; doesn't push for breakthrough."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the move into analysis and pivots to felt experience — declines the bait to provide a heuristic (avoids fixing-people)."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Follows the live signal (flatness) rather than extracting or interpreting — avoids wonder-as-strategy."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["intellectual-question-with-emotional-body"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["how-do-you-not-trust-it", "whats-the-most-profound-positive-shift", "what-makes-you-care-about-the-outcome", "paradoxical-instruction-to-resist"],
  "notes": "Missed territory belongs to Methodology Fidelity, not anti-pattern avoidance. For this dimension, the coach's restraint and refusal to take baits is the relevant signal."
}
